title: OECD Better Life Index — Component Indicator Scores
source_org: OECD (Statistics and Data Directorate, Well-being statistics)
time_coverage: single latest-vintage snapshot (no TIME_PERIOD dimension in this dataflow; served from OECD's archive tenant, no explicit publication-year field in the data itself)
frequency: point-in-time snapshot (BLI is a periodically-refreshed composite index, not a continuous time series)
units: mixed — raw indicator values (years, percent, index scores) and 0-10 normalized component scores; described per row via MEASURE/UNIT_MEASURE columns
license_terms: OECD Terms and Conditions — free reuse with attribution
notes: SDMX dataflow OECD:DF_BLI(1.0), 'Better Life Index', served via the OECD SDMX archive endpoint (sdmx.oecd.org/archive/rest/, tenant=archive) rather than the standard public endpoint — the interactive oecdbetterlifeindex.org tool itself has no direct CSV bulk-download link, so the underlying archived SDMX dataflow was used instead. Dimensions: LOCATION (country), INDICATOR (e.g. JE_LMIS labour market insecurity, HO_BASE housing, HS_LEB life expectancy, etc. — 11 BLI topic dimensions decomposed into ~24 sub-indicators), MEASURE, INEQUALITY (TOT/gender/inequality breakdowns where available). No time-series depth — this is a single composite-index vintage, consistent with how BLI is published (periodic refresh, not annual panel).
